description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a deer, depicted with a low-polygon aesthetic and a uniform brown coloration. The deer has a robust body, slender legs, and a slightly arched back, with its head lowered as if grazing. Prominent, angular antlers extend outward from the head, adding a distinctive feature to its silhouette. The tail is short and tapers to a point, while the ears are small and pointed, positioned on either side of the head. The hooves are visible and rendered in a darker shade, contrasting with the lighter brown of the body. The overall form is simplified, with minimal surface detail, emphasizing the geometric structure of the animal.
description: A low-polygon brown deer with prominent angular antlers, lowered head, and visible dark hooves, depicted in a grazing posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deer's head lowered, antlers extending outward, and both ears visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full body profile, lowered head, and the angular structure of the antlers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short, pointed tail and the alignment of the legs and back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body profile, antlers, and the grazing posture from the other side.
